evidence_hint: src/pipeline.ts:91-103 — verify(...) produces VerifyResult[] (incl. bodyPreserved=false) but pipeline never inspects `issues`; only writes verification-report.json gated behind `if (!config.dryRun)`; returns success regardless.
residual_if_not_resolved: Consume verify signal: aggregate issues, log a summary, and throw or return `hadVerificationFailures` so CI can gate. Don't gate the in-memory result behind dryRun.
